query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'change_in_youth_app' AND TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27sEaT2BZNqjVK1.3777d857e0cd --database JfuWbL5SX5FRFCFWK9F3WU --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE, IS_NULLABLE, COLUMN_DEFAULT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'change_in_youth_app' AND TABLE_NAME = 'invoices' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
